data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"91f5-0aec","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T14:50:52Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Validate and improve root-level onboarding documentation for DSO plugin","description":"New users have no functional entry point for understanding or installing the Digital Service Orchestra plugin. The project root README is nearly empty and there is no INSTALL file at the root. The only installation documentation lives at plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md, buried inside the plugin directory and written for the git-clone path superseded by marketplace-based installation.","successCriteria":["Gap audit report documents missing/inaccurate/incomplete items across README, INSTALL, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with command verification appendix","Root README.md describes DSO in plain language understandable to a non-engineer, contains link to INSTALL.md","Root INSTALL.md provides step-by-step marketplace installation instructions with required/optional deps, macOS homebrew steps, brew.sh link","INSTALL.md includes /dso:onboarding description with realistic time expectations and link to configuration reference","INSTALL.md contains Integration Setup section (Jira, Figma, Confluence subsections with API key guide links)","plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md removed, all internal references updated to root INSTALL.md, .test-index cleaned","Automated config key scan produces gap list; every absent key added to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md","All hyperlinks resolve without error; team member walkthrough confirms steps are followable to /dso:onboarding"]},"stories":[{"id":"95fa-1b8c","title":"As a platform engineer joining a DSO team, I can read a comprehensive gap audit report","description":"Gap audit of root README, current INSTALL, and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md producing gap report with command verification appendix and config key gap list","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Gap audit report exists documenting every missing/inaccurate/incomplete item across root README.md, plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md, and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md","Report includes command verification appendix: (a) each shell command executed verbatim in clean shell; (b) /plugin commands confirmed against official marketplace docs","Report includes config key gap list from automated scan covering all 4 locations: plugins/dso/ tree, .claude/dso-config.conf, example config, inline _read_config_key() + raw grep/cut patterns"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Config key scan must cover 4 locations: plugins/dso/ tree, .claude/dso-config.conf, example config file, inline _read_config_key() calls","[Maintainability] Config key scan must also detect raw grep/cut patterns against dso-config.conf"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"Gap audit report documents what is missing, inaccurate, or incomplete"},{"id":"3028-d955","title":"As a platform engineer, I can follow root INSTALL.md step-by-step to install DSO from the Claude Code marketplace","description":"New root INSTALL.md with marketplace install commands, required/optional dep lists with macOS homebrew steps, and /dso:onboarding orientation","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Root INSTALL.md provides /plugin marketplace add navapbc/digital-service-orchestra + /plugin install dso@digital-service-orchestra instructions","Root INSTALL.md lists required/optional deps separately with homebrew steps and brew.sh link","Root INSTALL.md includes bash >= 4.0 and GNU coreutils as BLOCKING prerequisites before the /dso:onboarding step","INSTALL.md describes /dso:onboarding with realistic time expectations and config reference link","All links to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md use correct relative path (plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md)"],"considerations":["[Reliability] bash >= 4.0 and GNU coreutils must appear as BLOCKING prerequisites before /dso:onboarding","[Integration] Verified: marketplace install commands are /plugin marketplace add navapbc/digital-service-orchestra and /plugin install dso@digital-service-orchestra","[Maintainability] Existing README.md contains ast-grep optional dep section -- migrate to INSTALL.md or mark superseded before Story B runs"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95fa-1b8c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Root INSTALL.md provides step-by-step marketplace installation instructions"},{"id":"b2ec-ddb9","title":"As a DSO user or developer, I can find documentation for every configuration key in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md","description":"Additive entries for every gap-list key identified by Story A's audit","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Every configuration key on the gap audit report's gap list is documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with description, type, default, and example"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Known gap namespaces: brainstorm.enforce_entry_gate, sprint.max_replan_cycles, test_gate.*, test_quality.*, worktree.isolation_enabled, orchestration.max_agents, design.figma_collaboration, bug_report.title_warning_enabled, ticket_clarity.threshold, clarity_check.pass_threshold","[Maintainability] New entries must not alter existing section headings or anchor IDs -- Story C's INSTALL.md links to specific anchors in this file"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95fa-1b8c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Automated scan gap list -- every absent key added to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md"},{"id":"6845-09e4","title":"As a non-engineer exploring DSO, I can read a root README that describes what the plugin does in plain language","description":"Rewritten root README.md in plain accessible language with link to INSTALL.md","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Root README.md describes DSO in plain language understandable to a non-engineer with no unexplained acronyms or jargon","Root README.md contains a link to root INSTALL.md"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] This story depends on Story C because README links to root INSTALL.md which Story C creates"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95fa-1b8c","3028-d955"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Root README.md describes DSO in plain language and links to INSTALL.md"},{"id":"9eeb-8802","title":"As a platform engineer, I can configure integrations using the Integration Setup section in INSTALL.md","description":"Additive Integration Setup section added to INSTALL.md with Jira, Figma, and Confluence subsections","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["INSTALL.md contains Integration Setup section with Jira (API token + user email + Jira URL + Atlassian guide link), Figma (PAT + Figma guide link), and Confluence (single placeholder sentence) subsections","All content from Story C (install steps, dep lists, prerequisites, /dso:onboarding section) is preserved intact in INSTALL.md"],"considerations":["[Integration] Verified: Jira API token guide URL from epic research","[Integration] Verified: Figma PAT guide URL from epic research","[Integration] Confluence integration not yet implemented -- subsection must state this explicitly"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["3028-d955"],"satisfiesCriterion":"INSTALL.md Integration Setup section with Jira, Figma, Confluence subsections"},{"id":"4cb3-5553","title":"As a developer maintaining DSO, all installation docs live at the root with no stale links to the old plugin-directory INSTALL","description":"Remove plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md and update all internal references to root INSTALL.md","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md updated to reference root INSTALL.md before deletion commit","plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md removed from repository",".test-index has no stale entries for the removed file","dso-setup.sh post-setup output directs to root INSTALL.md","test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh updated to validate root INSTALL.md","All other internal references updated to root INSTALL.md"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] CLAUDE.md MUST be updated before deletion -- referential integrity pre-commit gate blocks commits otherwise","[Testing] .test-index: determine delete vs. remap for test-reinstall-hooks*.sh entries","[Testing] .test-index cleanup must not break test gate","[Reliability] Hard coordination dependency on 9b59-bac7 -- cannot complete until that ticket closes"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["3028-d955"],"satisfiesCriterion":"plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md removed, all internal references updated"},{"id":"160d-795f","title":"As a team member not involved in authoring, I can verify all docs links resolve and follow the path to /dso:onboarding","description":"Automated link check and human walkthrough validation over all documentation created by this epic","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["All hyperlinks in edited/added docs resolve without error (zero 404/5xx from automated link check)","Team member not involved in authoring confirms path from README to /dso:onboarding is followable without additional context"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Link check must verify: brew.sh, Atlassian API token guide, Figma PAT guide, marketplace docs URL"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["6845-09e4","9eeb-8802","b2ec-ddb9","4cb3-5553"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All hyperlinks resolve; team member walkthrough confirms steps are followable"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":7,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["95fa-1b8c","3028-d955","4cb3-5553","160d-795f"]}}
